textByHash.4f5221fa82475232277f29b99b9d12e256d17091: Guards! Seek out Yewnock at once. Tell him to switch the machine on!
textByHash.6822d682297a7aadd648470393a22b49c1060fa3: Wait... I know what this is! Father warned me about this!
textByHash.7a157b06881d8dffc62d6d18e6fd63f56605cbdb: I don't understand! What is this?
textByHash.d76e2d351cdf9a71edbfff699b800a0e6d11c11f: This is all a lie! I've been framed!
